headline: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 release dominated the month with a wave of autonomous agent and reasoning demonstrations.
body: Anthropic shipped the Mythos model family and Fable 5, described as Mythos 5 with guardrails, now generally available with Fable 5 free on paid plans through June 22 before moving to usage credits. The release was paired with first-principles demos: Fable 5 autonomously played Factorio, simulated the solar system to predict eclipses, set a fluid simulation to Beethoven, and built a browser CAD editor with its own copilot. On technique rotation, context parallelism, attribution, filter propagation, and percolation are breaking out, with auto-scaling, resource analysis, software engineering, and training-free methods entering as new entrants, while tool calling, LLM as judge, and concept spawning are weakening. Separately, RAG was reargued as viable, with retrieval framed broadly across vector search, full text search, and caching.

cited_items.title: Claude Fable + Mythos 5 Are Live & The Numbers are INSANE
Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
